title: Design System: Saint Paul Camp Scoring

headline.purpose: Screen titles and the current operational task.

shadows.name: sticky-header
shadows.purpose: Separates the sticky identity bar while scrolling.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: One decisive mobile action per operational section.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 52px; padding: 12px 18px; color: oklch(0.16 0.022 306); background: oklch(0.71 0.15 296); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 14px; font: 750 .84rem/1.35 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Arial, sans-serif; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.71 0.15 296); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Large RTL field for night-time phone entry.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 50px; padding: 11px 13px; color: oklch(0.94 0.012 300); background: oklch(0.205 0.027 306); border: 1px solid oklch(0.34 0.035 306); border-radius: 13px; font: 650 .84rem/1.35 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.71 0.15 296); outline-offset: 3px; }

narrative.overview: A focused athletic operations interface for volunteers working quickly on phones at night. Energy comes from decisive hierarchy, compact timelines, and immediate feedback rather than decoration.

rules.name: The One Violet Rule
rules.body: Violet is the only brand accent and signals action or current state.

rules.name: The Active Surface Rule
rules.body: Only the task the user can act on now earns the strongest separation.

dos: Do put the next operational action first.
Do use large touch targets and short Egyptian Arabic labels.
donts: Don't build a generic SaaS dashboard.
Don't use neon, gradients, glass effects, or colored side stripes.
